title: Review: feat(jmap-chat): upgrade types to current spec
notes:
Maintainer risk: MEDIUM — Two P0 correctness bugs in serde handling (unknown enum variants break deserialization; None fields serialize as null). P1 risks are minor (footgun field visibility, untested error path). No security or API-lock-in issues beyond what is already committed.
Confidence: 15% chance of missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: did not run the server against real wire data; did not check the spec for whether null vs absent is actually defined for ChatStreamEnable optional fields. Would raise confidence if: integration test with a real JMAP Chat server, or if the spec text on ChatStreamEnable null semantics is found.
close_reason: All P0 and P1 findings resolved. Decision records preserved.
